label: Market Trades
description: Real-time market trade tape and own trade history for the selected instrument.

0.4.note: Zero any types or @ts-ignore (Record<string,unknown> cast for useLiveFeed is intentional).

0.7.note: isEmpty={trades.length===0} and emptyMessage='No trades yet' correctly wired to LiveFeedWidget.

0.8.note: error guard renders rose-400 error text.

1.1.note: Data via useTerminalData() only; recentTrades and ownTrades from context.

1.3.note: Market trades are instrument-level public market data; not org-filtered.

1.5.note: Strategy filter does not affect market trade tape.

1.6.note: Empty scope = all market trades visible (correct for a trade tape).

1.7.note: No reference data; mock generators in lib/mocks/generators (not imported by widget).

l1.notes: L1 pass. 1.3/1.4/1.5/1.6 N/A — market data widget.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ (1200ms live trade injection), batch ✓ (trades stop updating; own trades from ledger are static), paper N/A.

3.2.note: use-terminal-page-data.ts reads context.mode; 1200ms trade injection interval runs always (mock-mode) but is display-only. Batch mode: no new live trades injected.

3.5.note: Paper mode expected: read-only tape same as live. No behavioral change needed.

3.6.note: 1200ms setInterval in use-terminal-page-data.ts generates mock trades — runs in mock mode only; production uses real trade feed. useLiveFeed 500ms display interval is pure UI animation.

l3.notes: Agent checks pass. Human checks 3.3(N/A—read-only widget)/3.4(batch indicator on order-entry) required.

4.1.note: Tab toggle (All / Own Trades) has onValueChange wired to setTab. No dead buttons.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: All agent checks pass. Human checks 4.7(tab toggle works)/4.8(feed scrolls within widget) required.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all — market trades widget is universal market data. Own Trades tab shows trades placed via order-entry for any strategy.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 follows L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded colors in widget file. CLEAN.

7.4.note: MarketTradesWidget PascalCase, hooks useCamelCase, file kebab-case. CLEAN.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in widget file. CLEAN.

l7.notes: L7 pass. All mechanical checks clean.

8.1.note: text-[10px] → text-micro at lines 42, 45, 61; text-[9px] → text-nano at line 54; text-[8px] → text-pico at line 71. Tokens now available in globals.css @theme.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger from components/ui/*. LiveFeedWidget from shared/. CLEAN.

8.4.note: Agent: no img, no input, no interactive div without role. Trade rows use grid divs (display-only, not interactive). Human: keyboard tab switch required.

8.5.note: Human check required — responsive at minW=2, minH=2.

keepSeparate.rationale: Market trades and calendar events occupy the same bottom-row slot but serve different data domains — merging would require tabbing and lose simultaneous visibility.

relationships.notes: Singleton. Driven by selectedInstrument from terminal-watchlist. Own Trades tab cross-references orders placed via order-entry widget.

dataContract.mockSource: use-terminal-page-data.ts 1200ms mock trade injection loop using mock01/mockRange deterministic generators
dataContract.notes: Production: WS trade feed per instrument. Mock: 1200ms interval injects synthetic trades. useLiveFeed(allTrades, 500) adds 500ms display animation on top of data update interval.

gaps: Own Trades key={i} (index-based) will cause display issues when trades are reordered
DeFi on-chain trade feed not verified
coverage.notes: key={i} on trade rows is a known cosmetic gap — acceptable for a live-prepend feed where stable IDs are not exposed by context shape.

knownIssues: key={i} on trade rows — no stable ID from Record<string,unknown> shape; acceptable for live feed
Tab 'own' shows trades from mock-trade-ledger which persists session-only

findings.description: market-trades-widget.tsx — ~6 user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: market-trades-widget.tsx:42,45,54,61,71 — text-[10px], text-[9px], text-[8px] arbitrary typography with no matching globals.css token
findings.deferReason: missing token — requests --text-micro (0.625rem/10px), --text-nano (0.5625rem/9px), --text-pico (0.5rem/8px) for dense trade tape rows and column headers
findings.fix: globals.css @theme now exposes --text-micro, --text-nano, --text-pico; widget updated to text-micro at lines 42, 45, 61, text-nano at line 54, text-pico at line 71.
